rawContent: Task: 260412-140927 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 260412-140927 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each in 143s, adding a simple add function to math.ts. The verify stage reported FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations (TS2344 errors in validator.ts), yet the pipeline proceeded through review-fix and ship without blocking. The ship stage completed with 0 retries and produced 'skipped' output due to local mode, which is coincidental — the structural defect is that verify FAIL status does not trigger a gate preventing pipeline progression to ship. | Pattern: This is the eighteenth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, 874, 260409-215133, 260409-220738, 260409-221218, 260409-222402, and now 260412-140927) exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw. Verify stage reports FAIL due to type constraint violations or test failures, yet review-fix and ship stages execute without any blocking mechanism. The autofix stage cannot resolve PagesPageConfig structural type errors. The verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template has been recommended in seventeen prior retrospectives without implementation. | Suggestion: Implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template — this is the eighteenth consecutive run with the same flaw. Add a check that reads the verify stage exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing code that failed typecheck validation from entering the review-fix stage. This is a one-line configuration change to the ship stage template that has been recommended 17 times without implementation — escalate to a P0 bug ticket with label 'urgent' and tag 'pipeline-gate-flaw' if it is not addressed in this run's feedback loop. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage. Code that fails typecheck validation proceeds through review-fix and ship without any blocking mechanism. | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
